zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stoneham於1425年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯同勒時，她的父親Robert Stoneham25歲，母親Lady Mary Bernak19歲。她於1434年與Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年在英國英格蘭波藍德蒙卡斯特享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stoneham于1425年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯同勒时，她的父亲Robert Stoneham25岁，母亲Lady Mary Bernak19岁。她于1434年与Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1464年在英国英格兰波藍德蒙卡斯特享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stoneham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Kent): habitational name from North and South Stoneham (Hampshire), Stonham Aspal (Suffolk), Little Stonham (Suffolk), or Stoneham Farms in South Malling (Sussex). The Hampshire and Suffolk placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hām ‘village, homestead’, while the Sussex placename derives from Old English stān + hamm ‘water meadow’.

variants.name: Stonum
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Stoneham  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stoneham was born in 1425, in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Stoneham, was 25 and her mother, Lady Mary Bernak, was 19. She married Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston in 1434. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1464, in Muncaster, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stoneham est née en 1425, à Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Stoneham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Bernak, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston en 1434. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1464, à Muncaster, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stoneham 1425 in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Stoneham 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary Bernak 19. Sie hat 1434 Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1464 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Muncaster, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stoneham è nata il nel 1425 nel Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Stoneham, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Bernak, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston nel 1434. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1464, nel Muncaster, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stonehamが1425年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストーニレイグで生まれた時，父Robert Stonehamは25歳，母Lady Mary Bernakは19歳であった。1434年にSir John de Broughton III, of Prestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1464年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドムンカスターで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stoneham(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스톤리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Stoneham(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Bernak(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1434년 Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 먼카스터에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stoneham nasceu em 1425, em Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Stoneham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Bernak, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston em 1434. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1464, em Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stoneham родилась в 1425 г. в местности стоунелиг, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Stoneham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Bernak, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston в 1434 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1464 г. в местности мункастир, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stoneham nació en 1425, en Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Stoneham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Bernak, tenía 19 años.
